Liquidity.metricDefinition: Measures availability and cost of short term capital across venues
Liquidity.metricInsight: Shows how easily participants can enter or exit positions
Liquidity.role: Foundational layer of the risk curve
Liquidity.adjacent: Tightening here raises Credit spreads and compresses BTC Basis. Expansion supports Equity Breadth and High Beta.
Liquidity.scoreReason: Tight funding spreads and strong order book depth.
Liquidity.inputs: Macro: Stable reserves. Micro: Dealer balance sheet expansion.
Liquidity.quantOutputs: Funding spread -15bps, Depth Index 95th percentile, Turnover +34%
Liquidity.lookback: Q1 versus 1D, 30D, 60D. Q1 versus 90D. Q2 versus 1Y. Q1 versus 3Y.

Credit.metricDefinition: Tracks corporate and high yield bond spread widening
Credit.metricInsight: Early signal of credit deterioration and risk aversion
Credit.role: Core stress indicator for corporate health
Credit.adjacent: Affected by Liquidity. Widening Credit suppresses Equity Breadth and High Beta.
Credit.scoreReason: Spread widening due to leverage and refinancing risks.
Credit.inputs: Macro: Policy uncertainty. Micro: Corporate debt wall.
Credit.lookback: Q4 versus 1D and 30D. Q3 versus 60D. Q4 versus 90D and 1Y.

EquityBreadth.metricDefinition: Measures market participation through advance decline and sector dispersion
EquityBreadth.metricInsight: Shows whether rallies are broad based or concentrated
EquityBreadth.role: Key gauge of equity risk premium health
EquityBreadth.adjacent: Supported by Liquidity. Influences High Beta performance.
EquityBreadth.regime: Mega cap leadership with broadening attempts
EquityBreadth.scoreReason: Advance decline improving but concentration remains high.
EquityBreadth.inputs: Macro: Rotation signals. Micro: Sector dispersion rising.
EquityBreadth.quantOutputs: Breadth Ratio 61 percent, McClellan Oscillator +48, Percent above 200DMA 67 percent
EquityBreadth.lookback: Q2 versus 1D and 30D. Q1 versus 60D. Q2 versus 90D and 1Y.

HighBeta.description: High beta names under relative pressure
HighBeta.metricDefinition: Tracks performance of volatile, high sensitivity assets
HighBeta.metricInsight: Reflects current risk appetite and leverage positioning
HighBeta.role: Amplifier of moves across the risk curve
HighBeta.adjacent: Sensitive to Liquidity and Equity Breadth. Weakness can precede Credit widening.
HighBeta.scoreReason: Sensitivity to growth expectations and rate volatility.
HighBeta.inputs: Macro: Higher for longer bias. Micro: Growth rotation.
HighBeta.quantOutputs: Beta to SPX 1.45, Relative volatility +19 percent, Momentum -0.7 sigma
HighBeta.lookback: Q3 versus 1D, 30D, and 60D. Q4 versus 90D. Q3 versus 1Y.

BTCBasis.metricDefinition: Measures futures spot premium and funding rates in crypto
BTCBasis.metricInsight: Indicates institutional conviction and leverage direction
BTCBasis.role: Crypto risk appetite barometer and early liquidity signal
BTCBasis.adjacent: Supported by Liquidity. Positive basis reinforces High Beta and Equity sentiment.
BTCBasis.scoreReason: Strong futures premium supported by ETF inflows and spot demand.
BTCBasis.inputs: Macro: Risk on sentiment. Crypto: Institutional and ETF demand.
BTCBasis.quantOutputs: Perp Basis +195bps. CME BT*0 +172bps. CME BT*1 +148bps.
BTCBasis.lookback: Q1 versus all periods. +28 percent basis strength versus 90D.
